location: Magma-lit throne room of Cinder Keep

pre_mission.speaker: Twinfang Chief
pre_mission.line: So the crown sends its favorite hound. Tell me, Aric, when they pointed you here, did you wag or bare teeth?

pre_mission.speaker: Aric
pre_mission.line: I came for the people you butchered.

pre_mission.speaker: Twinfang Chief
pre_mission.line: Then you came for the work of better masters than me.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: He talks too much for a man about to lose.

battle_start.speaker: Twinfang Chief
battle_start.line: Come prove you were worth the leash.

mid_battle.speaker: Draven
mid_battle.line: Do not waste the hit. Finish it.

mid_battle.speaker: Sera
mid_battle.line: Hold the line. He is still standing.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: No. There is an explanation. There has to be.

post_mission.speaker: Kain
post_mission.line: There usually is. It is just never a kind one.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: We return to the capital. I will hear the truth from his own mouth.
